French political figures across the spectrum have condemned Trump's personal attacks, emphasizing the gravity of global issues.

From TMC to BJP, Congress to CPM: Dynasts take centre stage in West Bengal elections 2026
description: West Bengal's political landscape is witnessing a significant rise in dynastic representation for the 2026 assembly elections. Across major parties like TMC, BJP, Congress, and CPI(M), candidates from established political families are increasingly being fielded. This marks a departure from Bengal's traditional grassroots politics, as parties now prioritize candidates with existing voter recognition and organizational support.

The company's aggressive AI data center expansion is cited as a key driver for these cuts, which could affect up to 30,000 staff. Severance packages require signing documents first.

Analyst claims his company can’t find any buyers for OpenAI's shares; Elon Musk replies
description: Demand for OpenAI shares has reportedly cooled on the secondary market, with investors showing more interest in rival Anthropic.  Despite OpenAI's massive fundraising, buyers are flocking to Anthropic, citing a better risk-reward profile.  This shift comes as both companies restrict direct share trading, leading to alternative avenues for investors.

title: Stephen Curry, Ayesha Curry team up with $150bn mogul
description: Stephen Curry and Ayesha Curry have joined Warren Buffett in reviving his iconic charity lunch through a new auction titled “A Seat At The Table.” The initiative blends Buffett’s legacy in philanthropy with the Currys’ growing influence beyond basketball. With proceeds benefiting the Glide Foundation and Eat. Learn. Play. Foundation, the event aims to create meaningful change in underserved communities. Scheduled for June 24 in Omaha, the auction reflects a powerful collaboration focused on impact, purpose, and long-term community support.

title: 15 years of Game of Thrones: Daenerys, Jon return in new ‘Reign of Thrones’ trailer
description: Fifteen years after its debut, the 'Game of Thrones' legacy is celebrated with a new trailer blending original moments and spin-off footage. Despite a divisive finale, HBO's expanding universe, including 'House of the Dragon' and upcoming prequels like 'A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms,' continues to captivate fans, promising more Westeros adventures.

title: Martina Navratilova warns Emma Raducanu after Miami Open withdrawal
description: Emma Raducanu’s coaching changes are back in focus after Martina Navratilova urged her to stay with one coach longer. Raducanu, however, prefers flexibility and wants to rediscover her natural game. With mixed results, recent injuries, and no full-time coach, she stands at a key moment. Her next decision could define how her career moves forward.

title: Stephen Curry opens up on struggles as Ayesha Curry faces criticism
description: ​Stephen Curry, the NBA legend, is considered one of the most popular athletes in the world because of his talent. While Stephen Curry’s achievements have inspired billions of fans around the world, the Golden State Warriors’ star player remains committed to his career. Amid this, Stephen Curry opens up about what kept him going throughout the years through all the failures.
